mapper.insert: INSERT INTO appeal_records (penalty_id, user_id, appeal_reason, evidence, status, created_at) VALUES (#{penaltyId}, #{userId}, #{appealReason}, #{evidence}, 'pending', NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT ar.id, ar.penalty_id AS penaltyId, ar.user_id AS userId, ar.appeal_reason AS appealReason, ar.evidence, ar.status, ar.review_result AS reviewResult, ar.reviewer_id AS reviewerId, ar.review_time AS reviewTime, ar.review_remark AS reviewRemark, ar.created_at AS createdAt, pr.penalty_type AS penaltyType, pr.reason AS penaltyReason FROM appeal_records ar LEFT JOIN penalty_records pr ON ar.penalty_id = pr.id WHERE ar.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY ar.created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM appeal_records WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM appeal_records ar
AND ar.status = #{status}
mapper.update: UPDATE appeal_records SET status = #{status}, review_result = #{reviewResult}, reviewer_id = #{reviewerId}, review_time = NOW(), review_remark = #{reviewRemark} WHERE id = #{id}
